[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#080f18″ use_background_color_gradient=”on” background_color_gradient_direction=”90deg” background_color_gradient_stops=”#000000 0%|#071441 100%” custom_padding=”60px||||false|false” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”1″ make_equal=”on” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” width=”90%” max_width=”2560px” custom_padding=”50px||50px||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”30px||30px||false|false” custom_padding_phone=”20px||10px||false|false” custom_css_main_element=”display: flex;||align-items: center;||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.24.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_font_size=”5.3vw” header_2_font=”Aptos||||||||” header_2_text_align=”center” header_2_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_2_font_size=”50px” module_alignment=”center” custom_padding=”1px|||||” header_font_size_tablet=”60px” header_font_size_phone=”45px” header_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Contact Us

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Aptos||||||||” text_text_color=”#FFFFFF” text_font_size=”24px” text_line_height=”1.3em” text_orientation=”center” width=”74%” width_tablet=”74%” width_phone=”100%” width_last_edited=”on|phone” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”10px||10px||true|false” custom_padding=”23px||40px||false|false” text_font_size_tablet=”24px” text_font_size_phone=”18px” text_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI’s global presence and innovative tools mean help is always within reach. With offices in seven countries across North America, Asia and Europe, our team is ready to respond to the needs of our valued partners and customers.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.17.6″ _module_preset=”default” positioning=”none” z_index=”2″ custom_margin=”|20px||20px|false|true” custom_margin_tablet=”|20px||20px|false|true” custom_margin_phone=”|10px||10px|false|true” custom_margin_last_edited=”on|phone” border_radii=”off|15px|15px||” border_radii_tablet=”off|15px|15px||” border_radii_phone=”off|15px|15px||” border_radii_last_edited=”on|desktop” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,2_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” admin_label=”CTA Row” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” width=”90%” max_width=”2560px” custom_margin=”|||” custom_margin_tablet=”” custom_margin_phone=”-40px||||false|false” custom_margin_last_edited=”on|phone” custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][et_pb_text content_last_edited=”off|phone” admin_label=”Title” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”_initial” text_font=”–et_global_heading_font|600|||||||” text_text_color=”#000000″ text_line_height=”1.8em” header_font=”||||||||” header_text_align=”left” header_text_color=”#D99B51″ header_2_font=”–et_global_heading_font|600||on|||||” header_2_text_color=”#000000″ header_2_font_size=”22px” header_2_letter_spacing=”1px” header_2_line_height=”1.1em” max_width_last_edited=”off|desktop” custom_margin=”-1px||21px||false|false” custom_margin_tablet=”0px|||0px” custom_margin_phone=”” custom_margin_last_edited=”on|desktop” custom_padding=”||||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”” custom_padding_phone=”|0px|||false|false” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” header_2_text_align_tablet=”” header_2_text_align_phone=”center” header_2_text_align_last_edited=”on|phone” header_2_font_size_tablet=”22px” header_2_font_size_phone=”18px” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Support Links for Developers

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_toggle title=”Customer Portal” open_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”$||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”24px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”!||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”24px” disabled_on=”off|off|off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700||on|||||” title_font_size=”14px” title_letter_spacing=”3px” title_line_height=”2em” closed_title_font=”Aptos|700|||||||” body_font=”||||||||” body_line_height=”1.8em” custom_margin=”4px||20px|||” animation_style=”slide” animation_direction=”left” animation_delay=”200ms” animation_intensity_slide=”5%” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI’s Customer Portal for security advisories and other announcements. For assistance with access issues, please contact your AMI Sales Representative using the form.

Access Customer Portal  →

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”Support Portal” open_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”$||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”24px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”!||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”24px” disabled_on=”off|off|off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700||on|||||” title_font_size=”14px” title_letter_spacing=”3px” title_line_height=”2em” closed_title_font=”Aptos|700|||||||” body_font=”||||||||” body_line_height=”1.8em” custom_margin=”4px||20px|||” animation_style=”slide” animation_direction=”left” animation_delay=”200ms” animation_intensity_slide=”5%” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI’s support portal, hosted on EIP. For assistance with access issues, please contact your AMI Sales Representative using the form.

Access EIP  →

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”Training Services” open_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”$||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”24px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”!||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”24px” disabled_on=”off|off|off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700||on|||||” title_font_size=”14px” title_letter_spacing=”3px” title_line_height=”2em” closed_title_font=”Aptos|700|||||||” body_font=”||||||||” body_line_height=”1.8em” custom_margin=”4px||20px|||” animation_style=”slide” animation_direction=”left” animation_delay=”200ms” animation_intensity_slide=”5%” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI offers custom training at customer sites and AMI offices worldwide. Courses are designed around customers’ current projects for maximum effectiveness.

Aptio Training Brochure  →

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title=”Technical Support” open_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”$||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”24px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”!||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”24px” disabled_on=”off|off|off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700||on|||||” title_font_size=”14px” title_letter_spacing=”3px” title_line_height=”2em” closed_title_font=”Aptos|700|||||||” body_font=”||||||||” body_line_height=”1.8em” custom_margin=”4px||20px|||” animation_style=”slide” animation_direction=”left” animation_delay=”200ms” animation_intensity_slide=”5%” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Support services from AMI are dependent on your sales agreement. Please contact your AMI Sales Representative using the form.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_blurb title=”Corporate Headquarters” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||divi||400″ icon_color=”#008AD8″ icon_placement=”left” content_max_width=”100%” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”–et_global_heading_font|600||on|||||” header_text_color=”#000000″ header_font_size=”14px” header_letter_spacing=”2px” header_line_height=”1.8em” body_font=”||||||||” body_text_color=”#000000″ body_font_size=”16px” body_line_height=”1.8em” background_layout=”dark” custom_margin=”27px|||||” animation_style=”fold” animation_delay=”100ms” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

3095 Satellite Boulevard, Building 800, Suite 425 Duluth, Georgia 30096

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”2_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”20px|20px|20px|20px|true|true” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_width_all=”1px” border_color_all=”#b3b3b3″ global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][et_pb_code _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
